name: Mayonnaise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Combine the mayonnaise, sugar, and vanilla in a large bowl. Mix well until smooth.
Add the flour and baking soda, then mix again until all ingredients are well combined.
Form small balls from the dough and flatten each ball by criss-crossing with a fork dipped in flour.
Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
These cookies are a favorite among Stan's friends. Some of my former coworkers still ask me to bring these "Mayo Cookies" whenever they visit.
The absence of eggs, milk, and butter gives these cookies a unique taste that is delightfully different from traditional recipes.
